## Template Submission

**Template Title:**
<!-- e.g., SaaS Dashboard -->

**App Type:**
<!-- e.g., saas-dashboard (kebab-case, must be unique) -->

**Your Base Wallet Address:**
<!-- e.g., 0x1234... where your 5 USDC reward will be sent automatically -->

**What does your template generate?**
<!-- Brief description of the app this prompt produces -->

**Checklist:**
- [ ] I added exactly one `.md` file to the `templates/` folder
- [ ] My file has the correct frontmatter: `title`, `app_type`, `wallet`
- [ ] My `app_type` is not already taken (check existing files in `templates/`)
- [ ] I replaced the `wallet` field with my real Base wallet address
- [ ] I tested the prompt in AutoGit and the output runs without errors
- [ ] This is my first submission (one entry per GitHub account)

Read [HACKATHON.md](../blob/main/HACKATHON.md) for full rules.
